# localizedTitle

**Instance Property**

The localized title of the project type as shown to the user.

## Declaration

```swift
var localizedTitle: String { get }
```

## Describing a Project Type

- **projectType**: An identifier for the project type.
- **localizedDescription**: The localized description of the project type as shown to the user.
- **localizedAttributedDescription**: The localized attributed description of the project type as shown to the user.
- **image**: An optional image associated with the project type in the picker.
- **subtypeDescriptions**: An array of type descriptions used for subtype descriptions.
- **canProvideSubtypes**: A Boolean variable indicating whether subtypes can be fetched from the data source.
